title: Procedure Before Code
prompt: Identify algorithm-like structure before modern programming.

title: Representation Changes Method
prompt: Ask how prose, diagrams, tables, symbols, machines, or code express procedure.

title: Proof, Execution, Governance
prompt: Track how correctness, machine execution, and accountability enter the history.

title: Avoid Flat Origin Story
prompt: Separate word history, practice history, concept history, and modern formalization.
